session.user: Load and follow the skill instructions in .claude/skills/pr-feedback-classifier/SKILL.md Arguments: --pr 9068 Return the complete JSON output as your final message.
session.assistant: I'll load the skill and execute it with the specified PR argument.
session.tool_result:
1→--- 2→name: pr-feedback-classifier 3→description: > 4→ Fetches and classifies PR review feedback with context isolation. 5→ Returns structured JSON with thread IDs for deterministic resolution. 6→ Use when analyzing PR comments before addressing them. 7→argument-hint: "[--pr <number>] [--include-resolved]" 8→context: fork 9→agent: general-purpose 10→model: sonnet 11→--- 12→ 13→# PR Feedback Classifier 14→ 15→Fetch and classify all PR review feedback for the current branch's PR. 16→ 17→## Arguments 18→ 19→- `--pr <number>`: Target a specific PR by number (default: current branch's PR) 20→- `--include-resolved`: Include resolved threads (for reference) 21→ 22→Check `$ARGUMENTS` for flags. 23→ 24→## Critical Constraints 25→ 26→**DO NOT write Python scripts or any code files.** Classify the data using direct AI reasoning only. Writing code to process JSON is unnecessary and pollutes the filesystem. 27→ 28→## Steps 29→ 30→1. **Fetch PR info and all comments in a single call:**
... [195 lines omitted] ...
131→ "action_summary": "Bot suggestion: add unit tests for error handling paths", 133→ "original_comment": "Consider adding unit tests for the error handling paths in this endpoint" 171→ "error": null 185→## Error Case 199→ "error": "No PR found for branch feature-xyz" 217→ "error": null

## ✅ Dignified Python Review

**Last updated:** 2026-03-09 09:36:32 PT

Found 0 violations. All code complies with dignified-python standards.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

### Patterns Checked
✅ LBYL over EAFP - No violations
✅ Exception handling - No violations
✅ Path operations - No violations
✅ Import organization - No violations
✅ Default parameters - No violations
✅ Inline imports - Conditional imports allowed (anthropic_api_fast_path feature)
✅ Frozen dataclasses - No violations
✅ Keyword-only arguments - No violations
✅ Re-exports (__all__) - No violations

### Files Reviewed
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/context/types.py`: 0 violations
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/erk_installation/real.py`: 0 violations
- `src/erk/core/context.py`: 0 violations
- `tests/integration/test_real_global_config.py`: 0 violations

---

- **2026-03-09 09:36:32 PT**: No violations detected

"body": "<!-- tripwires-review -->

## ✅ Tripwires Review

**Last updated:** 2026-03-09 09:37:13 PT

Found 0 violations across 5 files. All changes follow erk coding standards correctly.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

### Tripwires Triggered
- **GlobalConfig field addition** → loaded [docs/learned/architecture/globalconfig-field-addition.md](https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/blob/master/docs/learned/architecture/globalconfig-field-addition.md)
- **Monkeypatch usage** → loaded [docs/learned/testing/monkeypatch-vs-fakes-decision.md](https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/blob/master/docs/learned/testing/monkeypatch-vs-fakes-decision.md)

### Tier 1 Pattern Matches
✅ `subprocess\.run` - None found
✅ `os\.chdir\(\)` - None found
✅ `import time\|time\.sleep\|datetime\.now` - None found
✅ `gt (sync|submit|restack)` without --no-interactive - None found
✅ try/except in gateway fake/dry_run files - None found

### Tier 2 Semantic Matches
✅ **GlobalConfig field addition** - Correctly implemented with all checklist items:
 - Field added to dataclass with default value
 - `.test()` factory method updated
 - Load logic updated in `RealErkInstallation.load_config()`
 - Save logic updated in `RealErkInstallation.save_config()`
 - Tests added for roundtrip and default loading
 - Documentation updated

✅ **Monkeypatch usage** - Acceptable use per guidelines:
 - Testing integration code (`RealErkInstallation`) that uses `Path.home()`
 - Process-level global for `~/.erk/` access (allowed exception)

### Files Reviewed
- `docs/learned/architecture/globalconfig-field-addition.md`: 0 violations
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/context/types.py`: 0 violations
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/erk_installation/real.py`: 0 violations
- `src/erk/core/context.py`: 0 violations
- `tests/integration/test_real_global_config.py`: 0 violations

---

### Activity Log
- **2026-03-09 09:37:13 PT**: No violations detected. GlobalConfig field addition follows all checklist requirements. Monkeypatch usage is acceptable per testing guidelines.

</details>",

Based on the PR feedback data:
1. **Discussion Comments Analysis**: - Comment by schrockn: "Plan Queued for Implementation" - This is an automated workflow message about plan submission - Comment by github-actions[bot]: "GitHub Action Started" - Workflow status update (informational) - Comment by github-actions[bot]: "Starting implementation" - Workflow status update (informational) - Comment by github-actions[bot]: "Dignified Python Review" - Bot review showing 0 violations (informational) - Comment by github-actions[bot]: "Dignified Code Simplifier Review" - Bot review showing 0 violations (informational) - Comment by github-actions[bot]: "Audit PR Docs" - Found 1 violation: drift risk in doc enumerable catalog (ACTIONABLE) - Comment by github-actions[bot]: "Test Coverage Review" - Found 1 untested code path (ACTIONABLE) - Comment by github-actions[bot]: "Tripwires Review" - 0 violations, all patterns correct (informational)
2. **Review Threads**: None
3. **File Restructuring**: No renames or moves detected - only modifications to existing files
4. **Classification**: - The "Audit PR Docs" comment is actionable (violation found - drift risk) - The "Test Coverage Review" comment is actionable (untested code path flagged) - Other bot and workflow comments are informational

The new `anthropic_api_fast_path` configuration field is properly tested for loading/saving, but the conditional logic that **uses** this flag to select between `FallbackPromptExecutor` and CLI executor is not tested." } ], "discussion_actions": [], "informational_count": 5, "batches": [ { "name": "Pre-Existing (Auto-Resolve)", "complexity": "pre_existing", "auto_proceed": true, "item_indices": [] }, { "name": "Local Fixes", "complexity": "local", "auto_proceed": true, "item_indices": [1] }, { "name": "Single-File", "complexity": "single_file", "auto_proceed": true, "item_indices": [0] }, { "name": "Cross-Cutting", "complexity": "cross_cutting", "auto_proceed": false, "item_indices": [] }, { "name": "Complex", "complexity": "complex", "auto_proceed": false, "item_indices": [] }, { "name": "Informational", "complexity": "informational", "auto_proceed": false, "item_indices": [] } ], "error": null } ```
